summary: Yangcheon's 2024 DPK margin was razor-thin in 갑 (황희 49.78 vs 구자룡 48.16) — the closest DPK hold in Seoul. Anchored by Mokdong's education-focused upper-middle-class apartment complexes; 황희's incumbency likely preserved the seat.

issues.label: Mokdong education culture
issues.description: Mokdong's reputation as a 학군 (school district) anchors preferences around education policy and real estate.

issues.label: Mokdong apartment cluster
issues.description: High-density apartments produce real-estate political gradient, weaker than Gangnam but present.

issues.label: Incumbent advantage
issues.description: 황희's long incumbency likely prevented a close race from flipping.
